stemHtml: The limits of the green scale of an airspeed indicator are…

options.a: VS1 for the lower limit and VLO for the upper limit
options.b: VS0 for the lower limit and VNO for the upper limit
options.c: VS1 for the lower limit and VNO for the upper limit
options.d: VS1 for the lower limit and VNE for the upper limit
